history.user: What are good fertilizers for wheat in rabi season?
history.assistant: For wheat in rabi season, you can use: 1) DAP (Di-ammonium Phosphate) at sowing time, 2) Urea in two split doses — first at sowing and second after first irrigation. Recommended dose is 120:60:40 NPK kg/ha.

history.user: And what about irrigation schedule?
history.assistant: Wheat typically needs 4-6 irrigations. Critical stages are: Crown Root Initiation (21 days), Tillering (40-45 days), Jointing (60-65 days), Flowering (80-85 days), Milk stage (100-105 days), and Dough stage (110-115 days).

history.user: Which crop should I plant in kharif on black soil?
history.assistant: For black soil in kharif, soybean, cotton, pigeon pea (tur), and sorghum are excellent choices. Soybean is especially popular in Maharashtra and Madhya Pradesh.

history.user: What are the symptoms of rice blast disease?
history.assistant: Rice blast shows diamond-shaped lesions on leaves with grey centers and dark borders. In severe cases, neck blast causes the panicle to break at the neck node, turning white (dead heads).

history.user: What pesticides can I use for aphids on brinjal?
history.assistant: For aphids on brinjal, you can use neem oil spray (5ml/L), imidacloprid 17.8% SL (0.3ml/L), or dimethoate 30% EC. Always follow recommended dosages.

history.user: These aren't working well. Kuch strong chahiye.

history.user: How do I manage water for my rice paddy during dry spells?
history.assistant: During dry spells, practice alternate wetting and drying (AWD) method. Maintain 2-5cm water during critical stages. Use mulching in bunds to reduce seepage.

history.user: But there's not enough water in the canal this year
history.assistant: You could consider rainwater harvesting, bore well irrigation, or contact your local irrigation department for canal water scheduling.

history.user: PMFBY mein claim kaise karta hoon?
history.assistant: PMFBY claim ke liye: 1) Fasal nuksan hone ke 72 ghante ke andar insurance company ya agriculture officer ko suchit karein, 2) CSC center ya PMFBY app pe claim file karein, 3) Required documents: policy number, bank details, nuksan ke photos.

history.user: Agar meri fasal mein thoda hi nuksan hua ho toh?
history.assistant: Agar nuksan threshold level (usually 33%) se kam hai toh claim eligible nahi hoga. Lekin local assessment team final decision leti hai.

history.user: What's the best method for composting at home?
history.assistant: For home composting: Layer green waste (kitchen scraps) and brown waste (dry leaves) in a pit or bin. Keep it moist, turn every 2 weeks. Ready in 2-3 months.

history.user: How to control fruit fly in mango orchard?
history.assistant: For fruit fly control: use pheromone traps (methyl eugenol), collect and destroy fallen fruits, apply bait spray (malathion + jaggery solution), and maintain orchard hygiene.

history.user: Can you also tell me about organic methods?
history.assistant: Organic methods include neem oil sprays, fruit bagging, releasing parasitoid wasps (Opius compensatus), and using protein bait traps with spinosad.

history.user: My cotton crop has severe bollworm infestation and nothing is working
history.assistant: For severe bollworm infestation resistant to common pesticides, try: 1) Emamectin benzoate 5% SG, 2) Chlorantraniliprole 18.5% SC, 3) Spinosad 45% SC. Use at recommended doses with proper spray technique.

history.user: How do agricultural subsidies work in India?
history.assistant: Agricultural subsidies in India include: fertilizer subsidies, seed subsidies, irrigation subsidies, credit subsidies (KCC), and crop insurance (PMFBY). You can access them through your local agriculture office or CSC centers.

history.user: I have 2 hectares of land, am I eligible for all of these?
history.assistant: Yes, small and marginal farmers (up to 2 hectares) are eligible for most schemes. PM-KISAN gives ₹6,000/year, PMFBY covers crop insurance, and KCC provides loans at 4% interest.

current_question: How do I get maximum benefit from all these schemes? I don't want to miss any.

history.user: Mere khet mein chuhon ki bahut samasya hai, fasal kha rahe hain

history.user: Which chemicals are used to preserve grain in storage?
history.assistant: For grain storage, Aluminium Phosphide tablets (for large scale), neem leaves, and dried turmeric powder are common. For small farmers, hermetic storage bags (PICS bags) are effective and chemical-free.

history.user: Aluminium Phosphide ke baare mein detail mein batao
history.assistant: Aluminium Phosphide (Celphos) is used for fumigation of stored grain. It releases phosphine gas. It's extremely toxic — only licensed pest control operators should handle it. Never use in living spaces.

history.user: What crops grow well in Vidarbha region?
